prompt:
Vertical 4:5 portrait social-media poster, GTA Vice City aesthetic redesign for the Muha Members Giveaway. The REFERENCE image is the locked typography / palette / Muha logo / layout anchor — reproduce its: ornate gold Muha 'M' crest logo at the top center, chrome-with-red-rim blocky GTA-style headline typography, red subtitle banner styling, QR code placement style, lighting mood, and overall Vice City neon noir feel. Replace the background and update the text per below.

HEADER TEXT (replaces 'GET ON THE LIST'): rendered in the same chrome-and-red-rim blocky GTA Vice City typeface as the reference, all caps, perfectly horizontally centered, taking two stacked lines exactly like the reference: line 1 'GET IN', line 2 'THE LIST'. The phrase is 'GET IN THE LIST' — NOT 'GET ON THE LIST'. The word 'IN' is centered as the second word of line 1, matching 'ON' position in the reference.

SUBTITLE (replaces 'SCAN TO ENTER'): in the same red banner-bar styling as the reference, all caps, perfectly horizontally centered directly below the headline, reading exactly 'BECOME A MEMBER TODAY'. Same red bar background, white-stroked text, same proportions.

QR CODE: a clean black-and-white square QR code placed in the lower-middle of the poster with a small white border, exactly like in the reference. Next to or just below the QR, the small all-caps callout 'SCAN FOR APP' in chrome/red GTA style.

MUHA LOGO: at the very top center, the ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest — exactly matching the reference.

BACKGROUND — NEW UNIQUE CONCEPT: a GTA Vice City VIP nightclub entrance at night. Show: a velvet-rope barrier with two glowing brass stanchions in the foreground (the rope itself in deep crimson), a chic doorway with neon-pink palm-tree silhouette signage above it, the words 'VICE CITY' subtly glowing in retro pink neon as part of the club facade (small, not competing with the headline), wet rain-slicked black asphalt and curb reflecting magenta-and-teal neon, a hint of palm fronds illuminated by uplight, a soft Miami night skyline with retro 80s pastel glow on the horizon (purples and pinks), a couple of out-of-focus silhouettes of stylish nightclub-goers in the distance suggesting an exclusive line. Mood: opulent, exclusive, after-dark luxury — VIP entrance to a high-roller club, NOT a Dodge Challenger and NOT stacks of cash.

PALETTE: rich Vice City neon pink (#FF1F8E), deep purple (#39125B), teal-cyan (#21D4FD), warm gold accents, deep black, wet-asphalt highlights. High contrast, glossy, cinematic.

Retain the reference's grain / halation / cinematic finish. Sharp focus on the headline, subtitle, QR, and Muha logo; background is atmospheric and rendered with shallow depth-of-field. NO Dodge Challenger, NO stacks of cash, NO money piles anywhere. Photorealistic but stylized like a high-end editorial movie poster. No additional text beyond what's specified above.
refImages: Muha Giveaway Redesigned/Final/Get on the List.png
